zh.Middleton, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Ann Ashton於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾米德萊頓時，她的父親Roger Ashton24歲，母親Ellen Molyneux28歲。她於大約1470年與Roger Charnock在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1512年3月10日在英國藍卡爾布萊克本享年68歲。

zh-hans.Middleton, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Ann Ashton于大约1445年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾米德萊頓时，她的父亲Roger Ashton24岁，母亲Ellen Molyneux28岁。她于大约1470年与Roger Charnock在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1512年3月10日在英国藍卡爾布萊克本享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Ann Ashton was born about 1445, in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Ashton, was 24 and her mother, Ellen Molyneux, was 28. She married Roger Charnock about 1470, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 10 March 1512, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Ann Ashton est née environ 1445, à Middleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Ashton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Ellen Molyneux, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Charnock environ 1470, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1512, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Ann Ashton um 1445 in Middleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Ashton 24 und ihre Mutter Ellen Molyneux 28. Sie hat um 1470 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Roger Charnock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 10. März 1512 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Blackburn, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ann Ashton è nata il circa 1445 nel Middleton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Ashton, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Ellen Molyneux, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Roger Charnock circa 1470, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 10 marzo 1512, nel Blackburn, Lancashire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Ashtonが約1445年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Roger Ashtonは24歳，母Ellen Molyneuxは28歳であった。約1470年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでRoger Charnockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1512年3月10日にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Ashton(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Ashton(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Molyneux(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Roger Charnock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 3월 10일 영국 랭카실르 블랙번에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Middleton, Lancashire, England: Middleton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ann Ashton nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Ashton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Molyneux, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Charnock aproximadamente 1470, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1512, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Ann Ashton родилась около 1445 г. в местности миддлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Ashton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Ellen Molyneux, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Charnock около 1470 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 10 марта 1512 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Ann Ashton nació aproximadamente 1445, en Middleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Ashton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Ellen Molyneux, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Roger Charnock aproximadamente 1470, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1512, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
